commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 5:26 And the God of Israel stirred up the spirit of Pul king of Assyria, and the spirit of Tilgath-pilneser king of Assyria, and he carried them away, even the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the half tribe of Manasseh, and brought them unto Halah, and Habor, and Hara, and to the river Gozan, unto this day. These princes were scourges in the hand of God, to punish the guilty. (Haydock) The former forced Israel to pay tribute; the latter carried many into captivity, 4 Kings xv. (Calmet) Lahela, or Hala and Haber, cities watered by the river Gozan. Ara; perhaps Rages, Tobias i. 16 (Du Hamel).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
